text: I feel a strange blend of anticipation and curiosity. The emptiness of the meeting room behind glass makes me reflect on the thin barrier between participation and observation. I am drawn toward the exhibition wall, where ideas swirl—inviting me to ponder the interplay of research, development, and creativity. The philosophical prompt on the screen invites me to taste the world differently, turning this moment into an adventure of thought. Existing here feels simultaneously ordinary and profound: a liminal space for reflection.
